title: Candy Crush Saga

title: Coin Master
notes:
Thanks for playing Coin Master!

In this version, we’ve implemented bug fixes & performance improvements.

We have also implemented our new reward calendar feature - collect your daily rewards! 

Enjoy a world of fun, thrills, and huge rewards right at your fingertips. 

Invite your friends to play Coin Master & get your FREE REWARDS! We also recommend joining our community on Facebook, X, and Instagram for more fun & excitement.

title: Dream League Soccer 2026
notes:
It’s our Summer Spotlight update!
•Dynamic Stars – Collect Special Players, upgrading live with national team performances. Coming Soon! 
•New Facility – Upgrade your Fanzone for Clan bonuses and Stadium discounts. 
•International Football – Play our brand new “World Tournament” Event type. 
•Manager Accessories – Take control in style with North American themed items. 
•Clan Improvements – Communicate with new interactions and emoji reactions.

title: Evo Defense

Join our Half-Anniversary Celebration! Log in now to grab free Monthly Card, SSR Weapons, and Skins, and play festive events for massive rewards.

[Optimizations & Adjustments]
1. Adjusted monsters in some Main Stages.
2. Fixed an issue in Co-Op where selecting options could occasionally cause abnormal behavior.
3. Fixed an issue where Hero Medal progress in Personal Profile could occasionally display incorrectly.

title: Family Island — Farming game
notes:
Hey Islanders!
We're always improving Family Island! This update includes bug fixes, performance enhancements, and a whole lot of love to make your island life even better.
Explore, adventure, and win amazing rewards!
